user_description.ru: Она пишет на твоём теле маркером — слова, своё имя, знаки.
user_description.en: She writes on your body with marker — words, her name, marks.

ai_description.ru: М позволяет Ж писать на его теле — знаки принадлежности, метки.
ai_description.en: M allows F to write on his body — marks of ownership, tags.

image_prompt: woman writing with marker on man's body, he lying on bed, intimate bedroom setting
